name: Custom OpenAI-Compatible Endpoint
description: Registers one operator-configured HTTPS OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint using configured model IDs.

env.description: Optional fallback display name for the custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint when no name Plugin Setting is configured.
Optional fallback HTTPS public-host OpenAI-compatible base URL ending in /v1 when no base_url Plugin Setting is configured.
Optional fallback bearer token for the custom endpoint when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.
Optional comma-separated model IDs exposed by the custom endpoint when no model_ids Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Endpoint name
settings.description: Optional display name for the configured endpoint. Falls back to CUSTOM_OPENAI_NAME or Custom OpenAI-Compatible Endpoint.

settings.label: OpenAI-compatible base URL
settings.description: HTTPS public-host base URL for an OpenAI-compatible API. It must end in /v1 or omit the path so the plugin can append /v1. Loopback, private-style, HTTP, IP-literal, query, and fragment URLs are rejected by the plugin.

settings.label: API key
settings.description: Optional bearer token for the endpoint. Falls back to CUSTOM_OPENAI_API_KEY.

settings.label: Model IDs
settings.description: Model IDs to expose for the endpoint. Use IDs from the endpoint's /v1/models response or provider documentation. Falls back to comma-separated CUSTOM_OPENAI_MODEL_IDS.

providers.name: Custom OpenAI-Compatible Endpoint
providers.description: Registers configured OpenAI-compatible chat models and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
